event: Fox hunting party riding through autumn countryside
description: A sporting painting showing three riders on horseback — a man in a red hunting coat on the right, a woman in dark riding attire and top hat in the center, and another rider behind — proceeding along a country lane flanked by autumn trees. A large pack of beagle hounds surrounds the horses and runs ahead. A gatekeeper or farmer figure stands by a gate on the right. The landscape shows bare and golden autumn trees against a blue sky with clouds. The scene is rendered with warm, naturalistic detail.
